rag_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they reference component ports
Use only visible identifiers from the current component type or implementation
Write range assumptions as boolean expressions comparing a value to concrete bounds
Write output dependency guarantees as relations between visible outputs and inputs
Avoid implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts
generic_rules: Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope
Align helper declaration types with expression types
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions
Use concrete bounds or named constants in range expressions
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use `eq` for equations and `guarantee` for guarantees
Boolean expressions should compare to concrete bounds or named constants
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers
Do not encode AADL property names as AGREE variables
